response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development and demonstrates strong technical skills, particularly in C-based environments (e.g., LabWindows/CVI). However, there is no clear evidence of embedded networking, Linux kernel modification, or security-focused development relevant to the role. Additionally, Japanese language proficiency is not mentioned, and networking/security technologies (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X) are absent from their experience.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience in embedded-like environments (LabWindows/CVI)
Proven ability to work across full stack and multiple languages (C, C++, D, Node.js, etc.)
Demonstrated experience in system-level development and DevOps practices
concerns: No direct experience with embedded networking, Linux kernel modifications, or security technologies specified in the job description
Japanese language proficiency is not listed, which is a required qualification
Lacks experience with networking protocols (REST API, NETCONF, SNMP) or embedded device hardware control
